title: Phase 7A: GPS tracking and geofence services
description: Build GPS tracking service for real-time driver location updates and geofence service for automatic arrival/departure detection at delivery stops.
steps: Create src/lib/services/gps-tracking.ts with GPS tracking service
Implement periodic location reporting from driver device
Store location history with timestamp, accuracy, speed, heading
Broadcast location updates via Socket.io to dispatch
Implement circular geofence zones around delivery addresses
Auto-detect arrival (enter geofence) and departure (exit geofence)
Trigger stop status updates and notifications on geofence events
